summary: Frontend-only testing of Power BI Report Designer multi-page features and alignment guides. All core features work correctly. Found and fixed one bug in ExportDialog zone count display.

fixed_bugs.issue: Export modal showed '0 recuadros definidos' instead of actual zone count. Used 'zones' property directly from store instead of getZones() function.
fixed_bugs.fix: Changed to use getZones() function for correct multi-page support

passed_tests: Page tab + button creates new empty page
Click on page tab switches active page
Page content is independent - each page has its own zones
Page counter shows 'current / total' format correctly
X button deletes page (only shown when >1 page exists)
Cannot delete last page - delete button hidden when only 1 page
Templates load on active page only (Layout Simple, Dashboard Ejecutivo)
Alignment guides: Red dashed lines appear when dragging element near another
Alignment guides disappear after drag ends
Export shows current page zone count correctly (after fix)
Export options: PNG, SVG, JSON all available
context_menu_notes: Right-click context menu implementation exists in PageTabs.jsx using Radix UI ContextMenu. During Playwright testing, menu items (Renombrar, Duplicar página, Eliminar página) were not visible - likely timing issue with Radix portal rendering. Manual testing recommended for context menu.
action_items: Verify context menu right-click functionality manually - Playwright had timing issues with Radix UI portal
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in ExportDialog.jsx: Changed zones selector to use getZones() for multi-page support
Fixed SVG generation to use getBackground() and getZones() instead of direct state properties
PageTabs.jsx correctly implements multi-page CRUD operations
Canvas.jsx correctly uses getZones() and getBackground() for current page content
designerStore.js has proper page management functions (addPage, deletePage, duplicatePage, renamePage)
seed_data_creation: N/A - Frontend-only SPA, uses templates for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-page features tested and working: 1) Add/delete/duplicate pages with + button and X button, 2) Page tabs for switching between pages, 3) Independent content per page, 4) Page counter (current/total), 5) Alignment guides appear as red dashed lines during drag, 6) Export shows correct zone count for current page. Context menu right-click needs manual verification. Bug fixed in ExportDialog.jsx - was using zones directly instead of getZones().
